penalties.description: Video content does not match FLS Precision Cutting task requirements - shows paper crafting tutorial instead of laparoscopic circle cutting on gauze

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as a non-FLS video showing paper crafting, while GPT-4o incorrectly attempted to score it as an FLS task. The video clearly shows paper fan making with no laparoscopic equipment, gauze, or FLS trainer box visible. This results in automatic zero score due to wrong task content.

disagreements.gpt_value: FLS Precision Cutting task with deviations
disagreements.rationale: Claude's description of paper crafting tutorial is accurate based on video content, while GPT-4o misidentified the task type entirely
Since this is not an FLS task, completion time is irrelevant and maximum time assignment is appropriate
GPT's line deviation penalty is invalid since this is not an FLS cutting task at all
FLS phases cannot be detected in a non-FLS video
